extras.content: in proportion to... 与…成比例 Tax is then calculated in proportion to what you earn. 所得税则是根据你的收入按比例计算的。
by/in comparison 相比之下 // in comparison with 与…比较起来 This painting is impressive in comparison with that one. 同那幅画相比，这幅画给人的印象更深刻。

extras.title: friends, associates
extras.content: They are not friends but associates in crime. 他们不是朋友，是共犯。

senses.example: The numbers are small in percentage terms, but significant.
senses.example_zh: 按百分比来说，这些数目并不大，但意义重大。

senses.example: The proportion of boys to girls is usually about four to one in science and engineering colleges.
senses.example_zh: 理工大学的男女生比例通常是4:1。

senses.def_en: an amount that is a part of a whole
senses.example: A large proportion of the students were sick because of the severe cold.
senses.example_zh: 由于严寒大部分学生都生病了。

senses.example: His expenditure is out of proportion to his income.
My garden doesn't stand comparison with his.
senses.example_zh: 我的花园无法与他的相比。

senses.example: His comparison of the heart to a pump helped the children understand its action.
senses.example_zh: 他将心脏比作打气筒有助于孩子们了解心脏的运作。

senses.example: This dinner is comparable to the best French cooking.
senses.example_zh: 这餐饭可与最好的法国烹饪媲美。

senses.example: No horse has a speed comparable to that of his.
senses.example_zh: 没有一匹马的速度能比得上他的马。

derivatives: incomparable a. 无比的,无双的,不可比拟的

senses.example: Let's make a comparative study of the two languages. // Now I'm living in comparative comfort.
senses.example_zh: 让我们对这两种语言做一个比较研究吧。// 我现在生活相对舒适。

senses.def_en: to connect in thought, memory, or imagination
senses.example: Whisky is usually associated with Scotland.
senses.example_zh: 人们常把威士忌同苏格兰联系起来。

senses.def_en: to spend time socially; keep company
senses.example: We have to associate with different kinds of people.
senses.example_zh: 我们要和各种各样的人交往。

senses.example: Having an association with English native speakers is one way to improve oral English.
senses.example_zh: 与母语是英语的人交往是提高英语口语的一种途径。

senses.example: We haven't really calculated the cost of the vacation yet.
senses.example_zh: 我们还没有确切地计算出度假要花多少钱。

senses.def_en: to guess sth. using as many facts as you can find
to be intended to have a particular effect
senses.example: This advertisement is calculated to attract the attention of housewives.
senses.example_zh: 这广告是为引起家庭主妇们的注意而设计的。

derivatives: calculation n. 计算;深思熟虑

senses.def_en: a clear difference between two similar things
senses.example: What is the distinction between butterflies and moths?
senses.example_zh: 蝴蝶与飞蛾有什么不同之处？

senses.def_en: the separation of people or things into different groups
